final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original brand identity showcase for 染秋 (RAN QIU), an autumn fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy.

Style/medium: clean editorial brand guideline poster, minimalist layout with generous white space, inspired by Japanese design manuals and Chinese contemporary branding
Composition: centered vertical layout with three distinct zones stacked — primary color swatch at top, secondary palette in middle, typography specimen at bottom, generous margins on all sides
Subject: brand color system and typography for 染秋 (RAN QIU), a seasonal fragrance house celebrating autumn botanicals
Color palette: warm amber as primary anchor (inspired by osmanthus and persimmon), deep terracotta and muted maple red as secondary accents, soft cream and charcoal for contrast, all colors derived from autumn flora
Materials/textures: flat matte color swatches with subtle paper grain texture, clean sans-serif typography, no gradients or 3D effects
Text (verbatim): "染秋" "RAN QIU" "桂花乌龙" "琥珀枫叶" "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: must display primary color, secondary colors, and typography in one cohesive layout; Chinese and English typography must be shown together; design must work at both digital and print scales
Avoid: generic perfume bottle imagery; Western floral clichés; overly ornate decorations; gradients unless essential; Behance generic flat style; 8K stuffer words
